title: Experimental CSS Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of cutting-edge CSS features: color-mix(), light-dark(), relative color syntax, and new color spaces
referenceSolutions: color-mix() blends two colors in a specified color space

validationRules.message: Select the correct answer about experimental CSS features

hints.text: Modern CSS is gaining new color functions. color-mix() blends two colors, light-dark() switches based on color scheme, and oklch provides perceptually uniform colors.
color-mix(in srgb, red 50%, blue) produces a purple. oklch() uses Lightness, Chroma, Hue for more perceptually uniform color manipulation than hsl().
color-mix(in srgb, red, blue) blends colors in the specified color space. oklch is preferred over hsl for perceptual uniformity because equal chroma changes feel visually equal.
